title: athyrium senanense
intro: Athyrium senanense, also known as the Japanese lady fern or autumn fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Athyriaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Athyrium senanense include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory conditions, and supporting immune function. Athyrium senanense can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being dried and used in supplement form.
